# Generated Files

Generated files are owned by generators. Do not edit them by hand.

## OpenAPI Sources

The package OpenAPI files below are source files, not generated files:

| Package | Source |
| --- | --- |
| `@lemma/files` | `packages/files/openapi/openapi.ts` |
| `@lemma/identity` | `packages/identity/openapi/openapi.ts` |
| `@lemma/ops` | `packages/ops/openapi/openapi.ts` |
| `@lemma/questions` | `packages/questions/openapi/openapi.ts` |
| `@lemma/workbook` | `packages/workbook/openapi/openapi.ts` |
| `@lemma/api-contract` | `packages/api-contract/src/openapi.ts` |

`@lemma/api-contract` composes package fragments into separate API contracts at
Node/tooling time:

- `openapi`: full API contract for API docs and whole-API linting
- `webOpenapi`: end-user web app contract; excludes ops and admin identity routes
- `adminOpenapi`: admin app contract; includes admin-owned routes

## API-docs embedding

`apps/api-docs` consumes the composed contract through a Vite virtual module that
is populated from `@lemma/api-contract/source` in `vite.config.js`.

```ts
import { openapi } from "virtual:lemma-openapi";
```

| Owner | Generator Config | Output | Command |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `@lemma/files` | `packages/files/orval.config.ts` | `packages/files/src/generated` | `pnpm --filter @lemma/files generate:hono` |
| `@lemma/identity` | `packages/identity/orval.config.ts` | `packages/identity/src/generated` | `pnpm --filter @lemma/identity generate:hono` |
| `@lemma/ops` | `packages/ops/orval.config.ts` | `packages/ops/src/generated` | `pnpm --filter @lemma/ops generate:hono` |
| `@lemma/questions` | `packages/questions/orval.config.ts` | `packages/questions/src/generated` | `pnpm --filter @lemma/questions generate:hono` |
| `@lemma/workbook` | `packages/workbook/orval.config.ts` | `packages/workbook/src/generated` | `pnpm --filter @lemma/workbook generate:hono` |
| `web` | `apps/web/orval.config.ts` | `apps/web/src/api/generated` | `pnpm --filter web generate:client` |

The web generator must use `@lemma/api-contract/source` for `webOpenapi` because
it runs in Node/tooling context and needs typed contract composition.
Admin/ops clients stay out via `webOpenapi` filtering.
Web identity generation is limited to `/identity/me` and `/identity/me/roles`; user
and role administration belongs to the admin app.

Run web generation directly:

```bash
pnpm --filter web generate:client
```

`apps/admin` currently keeps admin-owned API calls in domain API files instead
of generated Orval output. Add an admin generator against `adminOpenapi` only
after the shared browser API client is in place.

Run all OpenAPI generators:

```bash
pnpm generate:hono
```

Check that generated OpenAPI output is up to date:

```bash
pnpm generate:hono
```

`pnpm generate:hono` runs the OpenAPI generators. Review generated diffs for unexpected changes.

## App Generated Outputs

| Owner | Output | Regeneration command | Check policy |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `web` | `apps/web/src/routeTree.generated.ts` | `pnpm --filter web build` | Ignored by Biome, included in generated cleanliness check |
| `keycloak-theme` | `apps/keycloak-theme/src/kc.generated.tsx` | `pnpm --filter keycloak-theme build-keycloak-theme` | Checked by Biome, included in generated cleanliness check |

## Database Generated Output

`packages/db/src/types.d.ts` is generated by `kysely-codegen` from the database
schema.

```bash
pnpm --filter @lemma/db generate
```

This command needs a reachable PostgreSQL server and permission to create a
temporary database. It applies migration source to that temporary database,
generates types, then drops the database. Local application schema age cannot
affect generated types. Regenerate after migration changes.

## Check Policy

Generated output falls into three buckets:

- OpenAPI client/server generated code: regenerated by `pnpm generate:hono`,
  formatted after generation, and checked by reviewing generated diffs.
- App/tool generated files: regenerated by the owning app build command and
  checked as part of normal repo checks.
- Database types: regenerated from a migrated database and checked for
  cleanliness as part of normal repo checks.

## Review Rules

- Review source OpenAPI changes and generator config changes carefully.
- Contracts with recursive schemas must use the shared
  `@lemma/openapi-hono-generator` reusable Zod schema helper in Orval config so
  generated validators can emit lazy recursive schemas instead of weakening
  child references.
- Do not review generated output line by line unless generator behavior changed.
- Prefer separate commits for generated output when a change creates large diffs.
- If generated output changes without source OpenAPI, migration, or generator
  changes, treat it as suspicious and rerun the generator.
